PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-23-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Ferdon for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA). Byron Levy for Jason Martin.

The Court stated that Mr. Martin did not have priorty and that the Public Administrator did. Mr. Levy stated that Mr. Martin wanted to keep the home for his Son and that he wanted to avoid a Guardianship as he wanted to keep the costs down. The Parties met out in the hall to discuss the matter. Upon returning, Mr. Martin stated that they were giving up on being appointed Administrator of the Estate, that they would be filing a petition in Alameda County to be appointed as Guardian of the Estate of the Minor and that the only concern was that the property was vacant and uninsured. Mr. Ferdon pointed out that if Mr. Martin was appointed today, that he would be able to take care of the property. In addition, he stated that it was not his preference to decline to act but that since the petition was already here, that Mr. Martin be appointed with a short leash as the Temporary Administrator until January. The Court appointed Jason Martin as the Administrator of the Estate with no independent authority and no powers, (signing the order for the same in open court). The bond was set at $20,000.00. Status on filing of proof of appointment of Guardian of the Minor's estate by/in Alameda County was set for January 27, 2009.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Dec-03-2008 Continued To Dec-23-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
